## Summary

## Scope

- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## AI-assisted delivery gate (required)

- [ ] **Contract impact** documented (canonical payload fields/status/error behavior), or explicitly marked "No contract impact"
- [ ] **Test evidence** included (`bin/rspec`/`bin/ci` results and relevant spec files)
- [ ] **I18n impact** documented (`en`/`th` keys changed) or explicitly marked "No user-facing text change"
- [ ] **Rollback note** documented (what can be reverted safely if deployment/QA fails)

## Defect feedback loop (required for bug/defect/regression PRs)

- [ ] Linked issue or QA ticket
- [ ] Regression coverage added for the defect
- [ ] Updated at least one guardrail artifact (`.github/instructions/*`, `.github/skills/*`, `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `.github/prompts/*`, `AGENTS.md`, or `README.md`) to prevent recurrence

## Risk and rollout

- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollout notes:
